presets.name: FLUX — Sci-Fi Environment
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: abandoned space station interior] [Environment: zero gravity, floating debris, Earth visible through cracked window] [Lighting: emergency red lights, cold blue starlight] [Style: hard sci-fi, detailed mechanical, Ridley Scott aesthetic] [Mood: isolation, decay] [Exclude: aliens, monsters]

presets.name: MAI 2 — Chinese Ink Painting
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: misty mountain landscape with solitary pine] [Environment: rolling hills disappearing into fog] [Style: traditional Chinese ink wash painting, shuimo hua, minimal brushstrokes] [Mood: serene, contemplative, wabi-sabi] [Exclude: color, modern elements, humans]

presets.name: Gemini Nano — Scientific Illustration
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: cross-section of human cell with labeled organelles] [Environment: clean white background] [Style: scientific illustration, educational, accurate anatomy] [Text: "Mitochondria", "Nucleus", "Ribosomes" in clean sans-serif] [Exclude: artistic flourishes, incorrect proportions]

presets.name: Meta AI — Meme Template
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: distracted boyfriend meme format] [Environment: street scene] [Style: photorealistic, meme format, high contrast] [Text: placeholder text areas] [Mood: humorous, relatable] [Exclude: watermarks, low resolution]

presets.name: GPT Image 2 — Magazine Cover
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: portrait of female astronaut in spacesuit] [Environment: Mars surface, red dust] [Text: "VOGUE MARS" in bold serif masthead, "Issue 001" in small caps] [Style: high fashion magazine cover, dramatic lighting, couture spacesuit] [Constraints: 8.5x11 aspect ratio, readable at newsstand distance, barcode area reserved] [Use case: Magazine cover mockup]

presets.name: SD 3.5 — Pixel Art
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: retro RPG character sprite sheet] [Environment: transparent background] [Style: 16-bit pixel art, limited palette, crisp pixels] [Camera: flat orthographic, multiple angles] [Exclude: anti-aliasing, gradients, blur]
